title: paeonia mairei
intro: Paeonia mairei, also known as the Chinese peony, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Paeoniaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of China. The roots of Paeonia mairei have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, as well as its ability to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety. The health benefits of Paeonia mairei include reducing symptoms of menstrual cramps, improving sleep quality, and alleviating stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the dried root of Paeonia mairei is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
